---
title: "Language Acquisition"
---
:::{.callout-warning}
Under development
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 11/5    | Language development in the healthy brain |  Newport & Getz (2025) |
| Tues 11/10    | Language deprivation | Ferjan Ramirez et al. (2014) |
| Thurs 11/12   | Perinatal stroke  | Newport et al. (2022) |
| Tues 11/17    | Bilingualism | Costa & Sebastián-Gallés (2014) |
| Thurs 11/19   | Bilingualism | Antoniou (2019) 
| Tues 11/24    | <span class="exam-badge">Exam #3</span> | 
| Thurs 11/26 | *No class (Thanksgiving)*|


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Language Acquisition
(To be added)

:::
